allow: Bash(sqlite3 /d/AI_Investment/finguard/data/fundamentals.db "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';")
Bash(sqlite3 /d/AI_Investment/finguard/data/fundamentals.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as table_count FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';")
Bash(sqlite3 finguard/data/fundamentals.db "SELECT symbol, company_name FROM companies;")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('finguard/data/fundamentals.db'\); cursor = conn.cursor\(\); cursor.execute\('SELECT symbol, company_name FROM companies'\); print\('\\n'.join\([f'{row[0]}: {row[1]}' for row in cursor.fetchall\(\)]\)\); conn.close\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('finguard/data/fundamentals.db'\); cursor = conn.cursor\(\); cursor.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM companies'\); print\(f'Companies: {cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]}'\); cursor.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM annual_fundamentals'\); print\(f'Annual records: {cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]}'\); cursor.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM latest_quote_metrics'\); print\(f'Quote records: {cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]}'\); conn.close\(\)")
